#=== 1. Flush RX (清空残留)
jread 00000000
jwrite 00000001 00000001
jwrite 00000001 00000000
jread 00000000
jwrite 00000001 00000001
jwrite 00000001 00000000
#=== 2. 检查 TX FIFO
jread 00000010
#=== 3. 写 68 字节到 TX
jwrite 00000012 00000000
jwrite 00000013 0000009c
jwrite 00000011 00000001
jwrite 00000011 00000000
jwrite 00000012 00000001
jwrite 00000013 0000002d
jwrite 00000011 00000001
jwrite 00000011 00000000
jwrite 00000012 00000002
jwrite 00000013 000000cd
